instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Asset Administration Shell (AAS) security submodel (Plattform Industrie 4.0, Document 50) specifies X.509 certificate-based authentication and role-based access control for asset data access. Mosquitto (Document 52) implements MQTT security with TLS encryption and username/password authentication. Thingsboard (Document 53) employs JWT token authentication and fine-grained role-based access control for IoT platform security."
]
